differential_diagnoses: Primary Sjogren's syndrome with vasculitic neuropathy
next_steps: Obtain rheumatoid factor, anti-CCP, ANA, SSA/SSB, and ANCA serologies
Obtain joint imaging (radiographs of hands and feet) to assess for erosive disease
Schedule a muscle and sural nerve biopsy (gold standard for suspected vasculitic neuropathy)
Repeat MRI of the cervical and lumbar spine with adequate premedication for pain to obtain diagnostic images
Measure complement levels (C3, C4) and cryoglobulins
Coordinate care with rheumatology to discuss empiric corticosteroid initiation pending biopsy results
